title: Aida
writer: Carlo Castelli, Anna Gobbi, Giuseppe Morelli
actors: Renata Tebaldi, Ebe Stignani, Gino Bechi
plot: Aida, featuring the actress Sophia Loren, is a film adaptation of a theatre performance written by Verdi. The plot revolves around the character Radames who falls in love with what he thinks is a slave in a country his armies has ...
